title: Druggability Predictions of Ribonucleic Acid Crystal Structures
author: Rekand, Illimar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Presentation held at 2020 MMWS , where I presented our DrugPred-predictor software which was modified to predict the druggability of both RNA and protein binding sites from crystal structures using a machine learning model (XGBoost). The work presented herein culminated later into this publication: https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jcim.1c00155
